verbose_sections.note: Restates what the command does with four bullet-point descriptions; this is already captured in the frontmatter description and in the Step-by-step Command Implementation section below it.
Bullet-point prose re-describing pull.sh behavior that is already covered verbatim in the Command Implementation steps above. Redundant after the procedural spec.

findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: remove ## Overview (8 lines) — the frontmatter description field already conveys this; remove or collapse ## Features (8 lines) into a one-line cross-reference comment in ## Related Commands. Target reduction: 16 lines (12.5% -> ~3%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%) by removing similar overview and feature-prose sections.

clean_files.note: No critical or warning-pattern verbose sections. All sections are procedural rules, technical spec, or code. ## Usage is 9 lines (well under 50-line warning threshold).
